prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业社会热度高热推荐，对物理类考生吸引力强；本省2026年考生总数约39.37万人，按近年物理类占比约64%估算约25.20万人，较2025年24.9 8万人增加约2200人；中南财经政法大学位 于湖北省武汉市，为本省高校；该校在湖北省物理类招生占比近年约占总招生计划的40%–45%，本省考生报考意愿较强，地域优势明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移 趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（加剧竞争）、学校软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、本省物理类考生增加（加剧竞争）及计算机/电子信息等理工科专业热度高涨等多重因素 ，扩招效应与排名上升效应叠加，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年基准19378名继续后移（更难进），预测最低位次约19509名，区间19009–20009名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13300 → 14061 → 18018 → 18084 → 19378, showing a continuous downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 5300 positions in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 19378. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 659 → 674 → 684 → 713 → 691, with a reduction of 22 students in 2025 compared to 2024. The 2026 plan is 697 students, an increase of 6 students (about 0.87%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.
3. [School Level] 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily improved from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, with the school's comprehensive strength and recognition increasing in recent years.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2025, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but no obvious negative signals appeared in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin heat ranking 73 (average), short video exposure moderate; Law rated A-level, Applied Economics rated A- level; majors such as Law, Economics, and Finance directly correspond to advantageous disciplines; Science and Engineering majors like Statistics and Computer Science, though not A-rated, have strong social demand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Science and Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 393,700, with Physics Category accounting for approximately 64%, estimated at about 252,000, an increase of about 2,200 compared to 249,800 in 2025; Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, a local university; the proportion of Physics Category enrollment in Hubei Province in recent years accounts for about 40%–45% of the total enrollment plan, with strong willingness of local candidates to apply, showing obvious regional advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (intensifying competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (enhancing attractiveness), the increase in Physics Category candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the high popularity of Science and Engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, the expansion effect combined with the ranking rise effect is expected to cause the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 to continue to decline (harder to enter) from the 2025 baseline of 19378. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19509, with a range of 19009–20009.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 19009–20009, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Statistics, Economics Experimental Class) as the main choices, Tier 1 flagship majors (Law Experimental Class, Accounting Experimental Class, Computer Science Excellent Class) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 19009), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Law and Computer Science Excellent Experimental Class; for rankings near the upper limit (around 20009), prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2776 → 2891 → 2821 → 3279 → 2796, with a fluctuation range of about 2776–3279 in the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 2796, showing an overall oscillating trend. In 2024, it expanded to 3279, then contracted in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 513 → 498 → 467 → 440 → 428, decreasing for 5 consecutive years. The 2026 plan is 416, a reduction of 12 from 2025 (a decrease of about 2.8%), and the continued enrollment reduction slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily improved from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, with a rising trend in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition. In 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but no significant negative signals appeared in 2026 reputation data. Douyin popularity ranking is 73 (average), with moderate short video exposure and no viral-level dissemination.
5. [Advantageous Disciplines] Law is rated A-level (top nationally), Applied Economics is rated A- level, both are flagship disciplines; majors such as Law, Economics, and Finance directly correspond to these advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially hot (recommended); Finance/Economics categories are divided with a wait-and-see attitude; Accounting/Finance/Audit categories are recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 393,700, with an estimated 141,700 in History Category based on the recent proportion of about 36%, a slight increase from 141,400 in 2025. Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, a local university. Its enrollment proportion in Hubei's History Category has been about 30%–35% of the total enrollment plan in recent years, with strong willingness from local candidates and obvious regional advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the oscillating trend of historical rankings, the continued enrollment reduction in 2026 (easing competition), the rising Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), the slight increase in total provincial candidates (slightly intensifying competition), and the hot popularity of advantageous disciplines like Law, the enrollment reduction effect and ranking rise effect offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to the 2025 baseline of 2796, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 2769, and a range of 2271–3267.

For rankings near the upper limit (around 3267), prioritize Tier 3 with Tier 2 as supplementary.
